MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT .
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Chris Bechhold, Esq. (513.352.6790; Chris.Bechhold@thompsonhine.com) of Thompson Hine LLP for Plaintiffs, The Pep Boys-Manny, Moe & Jack et al.
Alison Lippa, Esq. (415.890.5361; alippa@nicolaidesllp.com) of Nicolaides Fink Thorpe Michaelides Sullivan LLP for Defendant, Fireman's Fund Insurance Company
Dan Johnston (312.855.1010; DJohnston@clausen.com) and Scott Ward, Esq. (949.260.3131; SWard@clausen.com) of Clausen Miller PC for Defendant, Old Republic Insurance Company.
Bruce Winkelman, Esq. (510.549.3311; bwinkelman@craig-winkelman.com) of Craig & Windelman LLP for Defendant, Executive Risk Indemnity, Inc.
Myles Morrison, Esq. (202.469.7750; mmorrison@ruggerilaw.com) of Shipman & Goodwin LLP for Defendant, New England Reinsurance Corporation.

A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT FIREMAN'S FUND INSURANCE COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is MOOT.

Ms. Lippa to prepare, circulate and submit one proposed order which repeats the substantive portion of the court's ruling for both motions in compliance with CRC. 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293 (415.274.9977; sheilapham28@gmail.com), Reported. =(302/RBU)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Chris Bechhold, Esq. (513.352.6790; Chris.Bechhold@thompsonhine.com) of Thompson Hine LLP for Plaintiffs, The Pep Boys-Manny, Moe & Jack et al.
Alison Lippa, Esq. (415.890.5361; alippa@nicolaidesllp.com) of Nicolaides Fink Thorpe Michaelides Sullivan LLP for Defendant, Fireman's Fund Insurance Company
Dan Johnston (312.855.1010; DJohnston@clausen.com) and Scott Ward, Esq. (949.260.3131; SWard@clausen.com) of Clausen Miller PC for Defendant, Old Republic Insurance Company.
Bruce Winkelman, Esq. (510.549.3311; bwinkelman@craig-winkelman.com) of Craig & Windelman LLP for Defendant, Executive Risk Indemnity, Inc.
Myles Morrison, Esq. (202.469.7750; mmorrison@ruggerilaw.com) of Shipman & Goodwin LLP for Defendant, New England Reinsurance Corporation.

ARGUED The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF THE PEP BOYS MANNY MOE & JACK OF CALIFORNIA LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT And Motion For Summary Adjudication Of Issues

Plaintiffs' motion for summary adjudication is denied as moot as to issue 1 [cause of action-- New England Policy]. Plantiff dismissed New England Reinsurance Corporation from this action.

The motion is denied as to issue 2 [Old Republic, American Excess, Fireman's Fund Policies].

See word minutes for details.

Ms. Lippa to prepare, circulate and submit one proposed order which repeats the substantive portion of the court's ruling for both motions in compliance with CRC. 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293 (415.274.9977; sheilapham28@gmail.com), Reported. =(302/RBU)
